key_insights.insight: The key to being a successful influencer is to be authentic and only promote products you believe in to build trust with your audience.
key_insights.quote: That is the key to being successful in in this industry and influencing...it's knowing what you're doing and knowing what you're talking about is is gospel like you use those products you you stand behind what you're saying.

key_insights.insight: Having a manager that truly understands your vision and goals is crucial for sustained success.
key_insights.quote: Having a manager that understands what your direction and what you want to do is utterly key because you know it's just so important like you can't do it alone.

key_insights.insight: It is better to build trust with an audience than take a large sum of money for something you do not believe in, as that trust will lead to more money in the long run.
key_insights.quote: No amount of money can make me take a job that I don't believe in...I'd rather build that trust and then take that money because the trust is what will earn you money in the future anyway.

key_insights.insight: Sharing both the highs and lows of your life is essential for relatability and engagement with your audience on social media.
key_insights.quote: I think a lot of people share the aspirational things but they don't share the low moments...you have to be honest and you have to include those things that maybe you don't really want to include it but your audience will appreciate that.

key_insights.insight: Don't be afraid to ask questions and admit when you don't understand something, especially when you're young and in intimidating business settings.
key_insights.quote: If I don't know something I just ask it…I'm not embarrassed.

key_insights.insight: It's crucial to balance ambition with gratitude and appreciate what you have achieved in the present moment.
key_insights.quote: It's not healthy to always always want more because you've got to be grateful for where you're at and the things you've achieved.

key_insights.insight: Having a strong, trusting relationship is key to a successful long-term partnership.
key_insights.quote: We have that complete and utter trust in one another and I think in a relationship that is literally all you need to survive.

actionable_advice.advice: Start a YouTube channel to build deeper relationships with your audience.
actionable_advice.how_to: Share behind-the-scenes content, including both the good and bad aspects of your day, to create a more authentic connection.

actionable_advice.advice: Plan your days to the nth degree and be strict with work.
actionable_advice.how_to: Filter requests and opportunities based on career goals, values, and alignment, declining anything that doesn't fit.

memorable_stories: The story of how Molly-Mae ranked the brands that wanted to work with her after Love Island, and chose Pretty Little Thing over bigger financial offers.
The story of Molly-Mae and her manager Fran staying in the same hotel room, highlighting the depth and closeness of their professional relationship.
The story of paparazzi photos and trolling that led to her having to take down images of her from Barbados.
Molly-Mae getting lip filler and having her sister call her to say it was enough.
contrarian_claims: It's okay to want more in life and never be fully content, as that drive can fuel achievement.
You don't need a large social circle to be happy, and it's acceptable to prioritize work and your partner over maintaining many friendships.
Having an ordinary life can be terrifying, and it's important to strive for extraordinary experiences.
episode_title: The Diary Of A CEO with Steven Bartlett - Molly Mae: How She Became Creative Director Of PLT At 22
